Help
  • Navi+ AI Menu Builder
    The navigation builder for ecommerce — no code, no conflicts.
    Why Navi+?
    Why default menus fall short — and how Navi+ fixes that.
    How to install Navi+
    Install in minutes on Shopify, WordPress, or any website.
    Choose the right menu type & platform
    Tab Bar · Mega Menu · Slide Menu · FAB · Grid Menu
    Common first questions
    The most common questions from new users, answered.
    Install on Shopify Install on WordPress Install for websites
    Ideas
    Default menu is too basic — customers can't find what they want 70% of visitors are on mobile — but your menu is driving them away Spending on ads but visitors bounce — poor navigation kills your funnel Making the menu look better means hiring a developer Every theme switch wipes your menu config — start from scratch No bottom navigation — mobile customers feel like using an old website
    See all ideas →
  • Menu types & items
    Tab Bar
    Fixed bottom nav for mobile, like a native app
    Mega Menu
    Rich dropdown with columns, images & links
    Slide Menu
    Smooth slide-in panel, multi-level navigation
    FAB / Floating
    Quick-access floating button for key actions
    Grid Menu
    Visual image grid for product categories
     Choose the right menu →
    Design
    Design overview How to style main menu items How to style submenu items How to add dividers

    Publish overview How to filter by device or URL How to configure mega menu sections How to set up slide menu How to set up sticky & FAB

    Partnership & resources
    Navi+ Care — Design service Earn rev share Changelog / Release Notes All help →
  • Pricing
  • Free support tools
    Tools to help you build a better, faster website. 100% free — no data stored.
    Design & Images
    Batch Image Converter
    Convert PNG, JPG to WebP in bulk
    Image Resizer
    Resize to any dimension instantly
    Color Palette Generator
    Generate brand color palettes
    AI Background Remover
    AI-powered background removal
    Photo Collage Maker
    Combine multiple photos into one
    Color Picker
    Pick exact colors from any image
    Watermark
    Add text or logo watermark to images
    Temp Image Upload
    Share images with a temporary link
    Security
    AES-GCM Encryption
    Encrypt & decrypt text with AES-GCM
    Password Generator
    Generate strong, secure passwords
    JWT Decoder & Inspector
    Decode and inspect JWT tokens
    Hash Generator & Verifier
    Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes
     All tools →
